language_scope: Chinese-language sources, output English with key Chinese terms preserved

source_cards.title: 阅文作家助手 / 阅文妙笔大模型 (Yuewen Group official portal)
source_cards.key_claim: Qidian/Yuewen's in-house authoring suite. Integrates DeepSeek-R1 + the proprietary 阅文妙笔 (Miaobi) web-novel LLM. Four flagship features: worldview design, character design, scene description, combat description. Used 100k+ times/week.
source_cards.relevance: Direct competitor / reference. Most established CN platform-native AI tool for our target audience (Qidian xianxia authors).

source_cards.title: 阅文集团率先部署DeepSeek，邀请全行业作家共同探索AI赋能创作 (BJ Daily, 2025-02-05)
source_cards.key_claim: Yuewen integrated independently-deployed DeepSeek-R1 into 作家助手 in Feb 2025, upgrading three modules: smart Q&A, inspiration retrieval, prose polishing. CEO position: 'AIGC will not replace authors; it is the golden finger; the protagonist remains the author.'
source_cards.relevance: Establishes that even the dominant CN platform sees AI as assistant, not generator. Validates our 'co-pilot' framing.

source_cards.title: 番茄小说基于豆包大模型推出AI辅助写作 (industry summary, 2024-2025)
source_cards.key_claim: Fanqie launched AI-assist in May 2024 using ByteDance's 豆包 model: 7 features—AI 扩写, AI 改写, 自定义描写, AI 续写, AI 起名, 卡文锦囊, AI 助手. Sept 2024 'AI training clause' provoked author backlash.
source_cards.relevance: Fanqie is largest free CN reader platform; their AI policy directly drives 5,000-AI-novels-per-day flooding.

source_cards.title: AI写作催生出番茄小说单日五千本首秀奇观 (Zhihu / multiple, March 2025)
source_cards.key_claim: Post-DeepSeek (Jan 2025), Fanqie daily new-book debuts went 400 → 5,606 (1302% YoY). Platform responded April 2025 with stricter 签约 review and refusal of repeat low-quality submitters.
source_cards.relevance: Shows the 'AI flood' market reality: low-quality, high-volume AI generators are the dominant deployment, not quality-focused systems.

source_cards.title: 七猫中文网 AI小助理 + 文心一言 (Qimao official notice, 2023+)
source_cards.key_claim: Qimao built 'AI 小助理' on Baidu 文心一言: 3 modules—码字灵感, 故事设定, 角色起名. Lighter than Yuewen Miaobi.
source_cards.relevance: Mid-tier free platform AI; thin wrapper around general LLM, not novel-tuned.

source_cards.title: 蛙蛙写作 (Wawa Writer, Hangzhou Yinli Zhihang)
source_cards.key_claim: China's most-reviewed standalone AI novel tool. Strong on '黄金三章' opening (80% conflict-construction efficiency claim). Documented weakness: '20章后易出现战力崩坏或人设偏移'—long-novel control fails after ~20 chapters. Parent 波形智能 acquired by OPPO.
source_cards.relevance: Closest commercial peer; their 20-chapter ceiling is the EXACT problem we are trying to solve for 100k+字 cultivation.

source_cards.title: 笔灵AI (Biling AI)
source_cards.key_claim: Vertical CN web-novel tool. '新建作品'-storage of outline+chapters lets AI 续写 recall full settings, partially solving '失忆症'. Reviewed as 'most web-novel-fluent six-sided fighter'.
source_cards.relevance: Demonstrates that author-managed outline+character store is the de-facto pattern in CN tooling. Our agent+八字内核 is one layer above this.

source_cards.title: 星月写作 (Xingyue Writing)
source_cards.key_claim: Full-pipeline CN tool covering 灵感→大纲→正文→润色→发布. Claims 92% character-personality consistency vs Wawa 65% / GPT-4 40%. 18 web-novel sub-genre templates including 玄幻/仙侠. Auto-extracts '高频爆点元素' from Qidian/Fanqie/Feilu.
source_cards.relevance: Most ambitious commercial CN system. Genre-specific tuning exists but is 套路-pattern-mining, not metaphysical-system-aware.

source_cards.title: 码哩写作 (Mali Writing)
source_cards.key_claim: AI-assist focused on 'no obvious AI traces' through process-driven steps: 故事设置→要素→大纲→章纲→正文. Targets continuation from any chapter.
source_cards.relevance: Process-discipline approach (vs raw generation). Useful pattern for our chapter-of-the-day cadence.

source_cards.title: 豆包 (ByteDance Doubao)
source_cards.key_claim: Doubao model deployed across 50+ ByteDance properties incl. Fanqie. Powers Fanqie's AI generation features. General-purpose, not novel-tuned at base.
source_cards.relevance: Default model behind Fanqie AI flood. Wide reach but commodity quality.

source_cards.title: DeepSeek 写网文 修仙 玄幻 (CSDN industry guide, 2025)
source_cards.key_claim: DeepSeek used by authors for: worldbuilding skeleton (3-min generation of 势力分布/修炼体系/核心矛盾), logic checking, contradiction detection. Explicit caveat: '不要用它来生成正文，它的梗都太老土了'—do not use it for prose, tropes feel dated.
source_cards.relevance: Authors converged on DeepSeek for outline/setting management, NOT for prose. Confirms scaffolding-vs-generation split.

source_cards.title: 晋江文学城 AI辅助写作使用规范 (Jinjiang official policy, 2025-02-18)
source_cards.key_claim: First CN platform with formal AI policy. Allows 3 levels: 文字型辅助 (proofreading) / 创意型辅助-要素 (inspiration) / 创意型辅助-粗纲 (rough outline). Beyond that = 锁章/黄牌/永久禁榜. CEO: '人类作者参与AI辅助是饮鸩止渴'.
source_cards.relevance: Hard regulatory ceiling on full AI generation in literary CN. Defensive moat for human authors retains value.

source_cards.title: 国家《人工智能生成合成内容标识办法》 + 番茄小说 AI 选项 (industry consolidated)
source_cards.key_claim: Cyberspace Administration regulation effective Sept 1, 2025: platforms must label AI-generated content; authors must self-declare. Fanqie added 'AI使用' checkbox Sept 23, 2025.
source_cards.relevance: Compliance baseline. Our system must support author-side AI provenance declaration.

source_cards.title: WebNovelBench: Placing LLM Novelists on the Web Novel Distribution (Lin et al., arXiv:2505.14818)
source_cards.key_claim: Benchmark over 4,000 CN web novels evaluated on 8 narrative dimensions (rhetorical technique, sensory description richness, character balance, etc.) via LLM-as-Judge + PCA percentile. Differentiates human masters / popular novels / LLM output. 24 SOTA LLMs ranked.
source_cards.relevance: Only rigorous CN web-novel eval academia I have. Useful for evaluation methodology.

source_cards.title: YILING0013/AI_NovelGenerator (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Sequential pipeline (NOT multi-agent): setting → directory → chapter → finalize → consistency check. Vector RAG for context. 7 modules incl. state tracking, foreshadowing mgmt, semantic search, knowledge base. Author admits low maintenance bandwidth.
source_cards.relevance: Most-starred CN long-novel OSS. Shows where the OSS bar is: vector-RAG + sequential prompts. Our agent loop is a step beyond.

source_cards.title: RhythmicWave/NovelForge (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Electron + FastAPI + SQLModel. Card-based authoring + JSON-Schema-validated AI generation. Optional Neo4j knowledge graph for character/plot relations. AGPLv3 + commercial license.
source_cards.relevance: Closest in 'structured cards + schema' philosophy to what we'd want for 八字命格 / 修炼境界 cards. Lacks domain logic—just storage.

source_cards.title: lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Built on Claude Code. 3-layer Story System: source truth (.story-system/), runtime contracts, read-model projections (.webnovel/). MASTER_SETTING.json + index.db + summaries/ + memory_scratchpad.json + RAG with reranking. 37 genre templates, 200万字+ scale claim.
source_cards.relevance: MOST aligned to our intended architecture (Claude Code + state-as-files + agent loop). Worth deep study; possible fork target.

source_cards.title: cjyyx/AI_Gen_Novel (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Multi-agent system applying cognitive writing model (planning/transformation/review) inspired by RecurrentGPT. Memory compression. Acknowledges: 'Current LLMs lack sufficient capability for long-form web novel creation.'
source_cards.relevance: Rare honest CN OSS that admits the unsolved problem. Matches our 'still mostly toys' thesis.

source_cards.title: xindoo/ai-novel-lab (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Generated complete 100-chapter, 428k+字 urban-fantasy. Layered consistency: macro worldbuilding/character/structure + micro chapter outlines + scene details. AGENTS.md as 'AI constitution'. Coherence improved 73→93/100 via revision loop.
source_cards.relevance: Empirical proof that long-form CN AI novels are achievable today—but only with disciplined AGENTS.md + multi-pass revision. Genre was urban-fantasy, not xianxia.

source_cards.title: MaoXiaoYuZ/Long-Novel-GPT (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Parallel-thread architecture for unlimited-chapter generation. Stages: chapter creation, plot expansion, manuscript refinement.
source_cards.relevance: Parallel-pipeline approach. Throughput-oriented; not consistency-oriented.

source_cards.title: BlinkDL/AI-Writer (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Original RWKV-based CN-pretrained novel generator (玄幻/言情). Predates LLM era; small specialist model.
source_cards.relevance: Historical baseline. Shows CN community has been building this since GPT-2 era.

source_cards.title: leenbj/novel-creator-skill (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Smart-State pattern using file-level long-term memory. Targets 百万字级 sustained creation.
source_cards.relevance: Another file-as-state pattern; converges with webnovel-writer and our planned architecture.

source_cards.title: 实测用 Claude Code 写小说，意外发现了组队开挂模式 (Huxiu / Tencent News, Nov 2025)
source_cards.key_claim: Claude Code finished '5 days of work' (vs human pro novelist 4-6 hr/day) in <20 min. Sub-agent dispatch (brainstorm / outline / chapter / polish / logic-check). 3-layer memory (short=current chapter / mid=auto-summary / long=outline+character+foreshadow). Successfully placed and recovered foreshadowing across 7 chapters / 21k 字.
source_cards.relevance: VALIDATES Claude Code subagent + file-state architecture for 长篇 CN novel work. Direct empirical evidence.

source_cards.title: 七千万用户的网文平台，打出了「反 AI」的第一枪 (ifanr/Tencent, March 2025)
source_cards.key_claim: Editor heuristics for AI detection: 'flowery vocabulary, hard transitions, unstable POV, plot-line drift, no main thread.' Identifies DeepSeek-R1 specific signature: '比喻+数字堆砌, 不必要的意象, 莫名其妙的描写'.
source_cards.relevance: Concrete editor-side AI tells we must avoid. Our system needs an 'AI 痕迹去除' pass.

source_cards.title: 知乎 various: AI 写小说真实评价 (multiple Zhihu zhuanlan, 2024-2025)
source_cards.key_claim: Author consensus: AI good at outline/lore/duplicate-checking, bad at: emotional shading, '人设崩坏', POV slips, name/place inconsistency, '套路同质化', dated tropes. Only ~10% of AI-assisted submissions get 签约. AI 'predigested-meal' (预制菜) feeling pervasive.
source_cards.relevance: Author community ground truth on what works and what doesn't. Our metaphysical-grounded prose layer must beat these failure modes.

source_cards.title: 修仙小说设定构造（3）境界 (Zhihu zhuanlan, ongoing)
source_cards.key_claim: Cultivation 境界 system must bind to worldview + character growth-line + 心魔. 4-5 tiers optimal (e.g. 凡人 9-tier: 炼气-筑基-结丹-元婴-化神-炼虚-合体-大乘-渡劫). Tier inflation + power-creep is the #1 failure of mediocre authors AND of AI generators.
source_cards.relevance: Domain knowledge AI lacks structurally. 境界 progression is non-trivial state machine that requires explicit modeling.

source_cards.title: DeepSeek成「算命大师」，AI的尽头是玄学？ (TMT Post, 2025)
source_cards.key_claim: DeepSeek used heavily for 八字/玄学 'fortune-telling'. Reader complaint: 'inputting different birth-data still produces near-identical outputs'—LLM lacks real metaphysical engine, only does plausible-style imitation.
source_cards.relevance: CRITICAL. LLM 算命 is statistical mimicry, not 八字奇门 logic. This is exactly the void our project's 'metaphysical kernel' fills.

source_cards.title: 中国一通百通：八字、奇门、太乙、紫薇、梅花、六爻、六壬、河洛 (Zhihu zhuanlan)
source_cards.key_claim: Survey of major CN metaphysical systems and their interconnection (天干地支 / 阴阳五行 base). Most can be encoded as deterministic state machines.
source_cards.relevance: Our 八字奇门 internal kernel can use deterministic CN metaphysics rules — provably sound — as ground truth grounding.

source_cards.title: hestudy/snowflake-fiction (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: Snowflake-method workflow with command tree for 短篇 1-3万字 / 长篇 10-50万字 / 巨著 100万+字. CN-localized adaptation of Randy Ingermanson method.
source_cards.relevance: Outline-discipline workflow. Compatible plug-in for our system.

source_cards.title: ExplosiveCoderflome/AI-Novel-Writing-Assistant (GitHub)
source_cards.key_claim: AI-Native long-novel system: Agent + worldview + 写法引擎 + RAG + 整本生产工作流. Targets idea→full novel automation.
source_cards.relevance: Most architecturally similar to a serious 'agent platform for novelists' design. Worth code review.

source_cards.title: AI落地的苦，没有人比网文圈更懂 (36Kr, 2025-03)
source_cards.key_claim: Verdict from CN web-novel industry insiders: AI tools are commercially live but practically struggle on tone, voice, character logic. Editors can identify AI prose by signature failure modes; flooding crashed quality bar.
source_cards.relevance: Best single CN industry-side reality check on AI novel deployment.
